item.title: Why is Steel Authority Of India Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Steel Authority Of India Ltd. (SAIL) witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹155.95 with a gain of ₹4.60 or 3.04%. This upward movement reflects a combination of robust market performance, favourable sector trends, and increased investor participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is PTC India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, PTC India Ltd's stock surged by 6.03% to close at ₹167.15, reflecting a notable uptick driven by robust dividend yield, rising investor participation, and favourable sector momentum. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Petronet LNG Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Petronet LNG Ltd. witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 3.74% to close at ₹257.65. This upward movement reflects a combination of sector momentum, attractive dividend yield, and recent positive trading patterns despite the stock's longer-term challenges. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is India Cements Capital Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, India Cements Capital Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, climbing 9.22% to ₹11.25, outperforming both its sector and the broader market indices despite ongoing challenges in its long-term financial performance. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd witnessed a significant price rise of 9.6%, closing at ₹299.65, marking a notable rebound after a period of underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Nidhi Granites Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Nidhi Granites Ltd experienced a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 9.98% to close at ₹200.15. This drop comes amid a broader pattern of underperformance and heightened volatility, signalling investor caution despite the stock's strong long-term gains. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Steelcast Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Steelcast Ltd's stock price surged by 4.23% to close at ₹235.35, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by strong financial performance, consistent growth, and increased institutional participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd witnessed a further decline in its share price, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹0.87. The stock’s fall reflects a combination of deteriorating financial performance, weak investor sentiment, and adverse market dynamics within the construction and real estate sector. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Zuari Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 01-Apr, Zuari Industries Ltd witnessed a significant price increase of 8.75%, closing at ₹230.55, marking a notable rebound after two days of decline and outperforming both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Has Jash Engineering Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Jash Engineering Ltd has declared a 30% dividend, amounting to 1.2 per share, with an ex-date of April 10, 2026. However, recent total returns show significant price declines, particularly in the short term, with no returns over longer periods. Time: Apr 01 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Avax Apparels?
item.description: Avax Apparels has announced a 3:1 bonus issue effective April 7, 2026, meaning shareholders will receive three additional shares for every share held. The record date and ex-date for this bonus are both April 7, 2026. Time: Apr 01 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: ONGC Joins Mojo Stocks List: A Strategic Addition to Large Cap Portfolio
item.description: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 1 April 2026, marking a significant endorsement of its investment potential amid a challenging sector backdrop. This large-cap oil major’s inclusion reflects its robust financial metrics, improving market sentiment, and strategic fit within a diversified portfolio focused on long-term value creation. Time: Apr 01 2026 10:50 PM IST
